rationale: Ecology & Evolution at L3 splits primarily by the question (adaptation, speciation, community assembly) and the system (marine, freshwater, tropical, polar). Conservation Biology earns 4 leaves because its policy-research community has clear sub-specialties. Climate-impact ecology gets 3 leaves because the climate-change-biology community is publishing large volumes across reach (range shifts, phenology, novel ecosystems).

subfields.name: Speciation, Adaptation & Selection
subfields.tagline: Speciation genetics, adaptation, natural selection in the wild.

subfields.name: Phylogenetics & Methods
subfields.tagline: Phylogenetic methods, tree inference, divergence dating methodology.

subfields.name: Molecular Evolution & Population Genetics
subfields.tagline: Population genetic theory, molecular evolution, genome evolution.

subfields.name: Evo-Devo & Comparative Genomics
subfields.tagline: Evo-devo, comparative genomics, ancient gene families.

subfields.name: Population Dynamics & Demography
subfields.tagline: Population dynamics models, demographic stochasticity, density-dependence.

subfields.name: Metapopulations & Dispersal
subfields.tagline: Metapopulation theory, dispersal ecology, source-sink dynamics.

subfields.name: Life History Evolution
subfields.tagline: Life history strategies, senescence, reproductive trade-offs.

subfields.name: Species Interactions & Coevolution
subfields.tagline: Plant-pollinator, predator-prey, parasitism, mutualism.

subfields.name: Food Webs & Ecological Networks
subfields.tagline: Food web analysis, trophic cascades, ecological networks.

subfields.name: Biodiversity Patterns & Community Assembly
subfields.tagline: Community assembly mechanisms, biodiversity patterns, functional ecology.

subfields.name: Animal Cognition & Behavior (Ecological)
subfields.tagline: Animal cognition in ecological context, collective behavior, group living.

subfields.name: Mating Systems & Sexual Selection
subfields.tagline: Mating systems, sexual selection, mate choice, sperm competition.

subfields.name: Social Evolution & Cooperation
subfields.tagline: Kin selection, eusociality, cooperation evolution, altruism.

subfields.name: Macroecology & Biogeographic Patterns
subfields.tagline: Latitudinal diversity, species-area relationships, biogeographic gradients.

subfields.name: Species Distribution Modeling
subfields.tagline: SDMs, niche modeling, predictive biogeography, range projections.

subfields.name: Conservation Genetics
subfields.tagline: Inbreeding, genetic rescue, conservation genomics, eDNA biodiversity.

subfields.name: Extinction Risk & IUCN Assessment
subfields.tagline: Red List assessment, extinction risk methodology, demographic viability.

subfields.name: Protected Area & Habitat Management
subfields.tagline: Protected area design, connectivity, restoration ecology, rewilding.

subfields.name: Human-Wildlife Conflict & Wildlife Trade
subfields.tagline: Human-wildlife conflict, wildlife trade, conservation conflict research.

subfields.name: Range Shifts & Phenological Mismatch
subfields.tagline: Climate-driven range shifts, phenology shifts, phenological mismatch.

subfields.name: Thermal Physiology & Limits
subfields.tagline: Thermal limits, heat stress, thermal performance curves, climate physiology.

subfields.name: Novel Ecosystems & Tipping Points
subfields.tagline: Novel ecosystems, ecological tipping points, regime shifts.

subfields.name: Soil Microbial Ecology
subfields.tagline: Soil microbiome, mycorrhizal networks, soil-microbe-plant interactions.

subfields.name: Marine Microbial Ecology
subfields.tagline: Marine microbiome, ocean microbiology, marine viral ecology.

subfields.name: Wildlife Disease & Emergence
subfields.tagline: Wildlife disease, vector ecology, emerging zoonotic disease ecology.

subfields.name: Deep-Time Paleobiology & Mass Extinction
subfields.tagline: Paleobiology, mass extinctions, deep-time evolution, paleoecology.

subfields.name: Paleogenomics & Ancient DNA
subfields.tagline: Ancient DNA, paleogenomics methods, ancient pathogen DNA.

subfields.name: Coral Reef & Tropical Marine Ecology
subfields.tagline: Coral reef ecology, coral bleaching, tropical marine systems.

subfields.name: Fisheries Science (Ecology)
subfields.tagline: Fish stock assessment, fisheries ecology, by-catch research.

subfields.name: Freshwater & Stream Ecology
subfields.tagline: Freshwater ecology, stream ecology, lake systems, river restoration.

subfields.name: Open Ocean & Deep-Sea Ecology
subfields.tagline: Open ocean ecology, deep-sea ecology, hydrothermal systems.

subfields.name: Food Web Theory & Ecological Modeling
subfields.tagline: Food web theory, ecosystem models, network ecology theory.

uncovered_concerns: Niche & neutral theory in ecological theory could be its own leaf; folded under Food Web Theory & Modeling at this depth.
Restoration ecology folds across Conservation Biology (protected area mgmt) and Global Change Ecology (novel ecosystems).
